section.div: Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life, Adventure, Romance, Drama

div.div:
A secret life is the one thing they have in common. At school, Hori is a prim and perfect social butterfly, but the truth is she's a brash homebody. Meanwhile, under a gloomy facade, Miyamura hides a gentle heart, along with piercings and tattoos. In a chance meeting, they both reveal a side they've never shown. Could this blossom into something new?
(Source: Funimation)
Kono Subarashii Sekai ni Shukufuku wo!

Kazuma Satou decides that today is the day to get out of the house for a bit. Since he dies, pointlessly, it's clearly a bad choice. The goddess who greets him in the afterlife, however, offers him a chance to be reborn in a world not unlike that of a video game, and as a bonus she'll even throw in a cool item or power! Can't possibly be a bad choice, right? Except he arrives with no money at all, dead average skills, and his "bonus" isn't useful at all--since he picked the goddess, Aqua, herself. How are the two of them supposed to defeat the evil Devil King and live happily ever after? Well, for them, it probably starts with day laboring rather than adventuring. And it's only going to get more disappointing from there!
(Source: Crunchyroll)
Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Sports

Taiki Inomata is on the boys' badminton team at sports powerhouse Eimei Junior and Senior High. He's in love with basketball player Chinatsu Kano, the older girl he trains alongside every morning in the gym. One Spring day, their relationship takes a sharp turn ... And thus begins this brand-new series of love, sports and youth! (Source: MANGA Plus)
Ookami no Kawa wo Kabutta Hitsujihime

Aki Rikujo, a Wolfa, works as a butler at the royal castle in the land of Sheepa. Her quiet and peaceful days get shaken up when she saves the life of Princess Momo Shiudafaris. The shy sheep princess immediately latches onto Aki who, before she knows it, becomes the princess’s private tutor. Momo wants more than just math lessons from Aki, and even sneaks into the wolf-woman’s bedroom to seduce her! Aki soon realizes that, under the timid woolly exterior, Momo is a wild animal!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
Gokugoku Futsuu no Fuufu no Hanashi

"Appears Out of Nowhere", focusing on the protagonists' life after the two got married. Unlike the previous work, it's a very ordinary story of an utterly ordinary couple.
Haru, a huge fan of his husband's sweat smell, and Aki, who loves his wife dearly, will now enjoy relaxed and intimate moments together they couldn't have before.
In addition to the full-length manga and illustrations about the protagonists' college days that has been already published on Twitter(X), this book also includes an exclusive 3-page manga that has not yet been published on socials!
(Source: MangaPlaza, edited)
Tanbo de Hirotta Onna Kishi, Inaka de Ore no Yome da to Omowarete Iru

Jin Mita lives as a farmer in a small town in the countryside. One morning, he discovers a female knight collapsed in his rice paddy. Her name is Seraphim, and it appears that she has come from another world. She knows nothing about how this world works and has nowhere to go. Unable to just ignore her plight, Jin suggests that she live with him, leading to his neighbors believing that she's his wife! Farm work under the sun, and meals made with fresh ingredients...this is the start of a story about living a relaxing life with a female knight in the countryside!

(Source: K MANGA)
